input.topic: Soft-launch corpus review — incident batch 4/6: landmark enterprise incidents and outages

candidate_data.review_scope: schema compliance, technical accuracy, historical accuracy, impact framing, source quality

input.notes:
Review the scoped live incident articles against the latest Astro schema in `site/src/content.config.ts`, the ratified private specs, and primary-source technical and historical evidence.

Scoped files:
- anthem-health-data-breach-2015.md
- colonial-pipeline-darkside-ransomware-2021.md
- crowdstrike-falcon-global-bsod-outage-2024.md
- equifax-data-breach-2017.md
- jbs-foods-ransomware-2021.md
- kaseya-vsa-supply-chain-attack-2021.md
- log4shell-mass-exploitation-2021.md
- marriott-starwood-data-breach-2018.md
- moveit-transfer-clop-mass-exploitation-2023.md
- yahoo-data-breaches-2013.md

Required outcome:
- correct schema drift, source drift, section drift, ATT&CK mapping issues, attribution overreach, and factual inaccuracies
- ensure the landmark incidents are historically framed with accurate scope, chronology, and impact language
- if any live article must be removed, merged, or reclassified, create a follow-on pipeline reprocess task before merge so the content is not lost

preconditions: Work from a dedicated review branch and keep changes scoped to the batch unless a shared validator or schema fix is required.
Queue follow-on reprocess tasks for any article that must be removed, merged, or reclassified.

history.note: Soft-launch corpus review queue — incident batch 4 of 6
